riskFocus: Ghost Content API SQL injection advisory

plan.title: Pinned public evidence
plan.summary: TryGhost/Ghost is represented by pinned advisory, release, postmortem, or hardening metadata.

plan.title: Benchmark risk transition
plan.summary: The after state models the public patch, replacement, or hardening signal.

coverageGaps.title: Production evidence
coverageGaps.summary: Benchmark reports cannot prove a downstream project's live monitoring, backups, approvals, or rollback path.
coverageGaps.recommendation: Keep these as explicit GAP items until the maintainer provides evidence.

userDecisions.title: Maintainer risk acceptance
userDecisions.summary: The maintainer must decide whether remaining evidence gaps block their production release.
userDecisions.recommendation: Document the decision in the project intake or risk policy.

sources.title: OWASP ASVS
sources.summary: Application security verification requirements for access control, data protection, logging, and business logic.

sources.title: OWASP API Security Top 10
sources.summary: API risk categories including broken object-level authorization and unrestricted access to sensitive business flows.

sources.title: NIST Privacy Framework
sources.summary: Privacy risk management framework for identifying and protecting personal data.

sources.title: CISA Secure by Design
sources.summary: Secure-by-design guidance that shifts security burden toward software producers and safer defaults.

sources.title: NIST SSDF SP 800-218
sources.summary: Secure software development practices for design, implementation, verification, release, and vulnerability response.

sources.title: OWASP SAMM
sources.summary: Software assurance maturity model covering governance, design, implementation, verification, and operations.

sources.title: SLSA
sources.summary: Supply-chain integrity framework for source, build, provenance, and artifact trust.

sources.title: OpenSSF Scorecard
sources.summary: Automated checks for open source project security posture and supply-chain hygiene.

sources.title: Google SRE Release Engineering
sources.summary: Release engineering practices for repeatable builds, automation, policy enforcement, audit trails, and rollback.

sources.title: Google SRE Monitoring Distributed Systems
sources.summary: Monitoring and alerting practices for detecting production failure and paging humans only when action is needed.

sources.title: Google SRE Embracing Risk
sources.summary: Explicit reliability risk management and owner-approved risk acceptance.

sources.title: CIS Control 11: Data Recovery
sources.summary: Backup and recovery controls for restoring data after destructive events or operational failures.

sources.title: NIST SP 800-34 Rev. 1
sources.summary: Contingency planning guidance for backup, recovery, and continuity of operations.

sources.title: DORA research
sources.summary: Software delivery and operational performance research, including continuous delivery and recovery capabilities.

sources.title: OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications
sources.summary: LLM application risk categories including prompt injection, sensitive information disclosure, supply-chain risk, and excessive agency.

sources.title: OWASP Agentic AI Threats and Mitigations
sources.summary: Threat model and mitigations for agents that can use tools, access resources, and take actions.

warnings.name: Production evidence still required
warnings.summary: The benchmark verifies the code or workflow signal, but deployed monitoring, rollback, and owner approval remain project-specific evidence.
warnings.recommendation: Collect production evidence in the consuming project before treating the release as production-ready.

coverageGaps.name: Production evidence still required
coverageGaps.summary: The benchmark verifies the code or workflow signal, but deployed monitoring, rollback, and owner approval remain project-specific evidence.
coverageGaps.recommendation: Collect production evidence in the consuming project before treating the release as production-ready.

checks.name: Benchmark upstream evidence
checks.summary: Ghost Content API SQL injection advisory is pinned to public upstream evidence.

checks.name: Database query parameterization
checks.summary: User-controlled slug ordering uses placeholders and bindings.

checks.name: Production evidence still required
checks.summary: The benchmark verifies the code or workflow signal, but deployed monitoring, rollback, and owner approval remain project-specific evidence.
checks.recommendation: Collect production evidence in the consuming project before treating the release as production-ready.
